name: Launchpad Rebuild
goal: Ship a cleaner onboarding flow and reduce user drop-off in the first 5 minutes.
lastState: Mapped the current onboarding steps and identified the three screens with the highest abandonment. Wireframes are done, implementation started on the account step.
nextAction: Open the onboarding component and finish the validation states for the account creation form.
startup:
Repo: github.com/example/launchpad
Branch: feature/onboarding-rewrite
Start: npm install && npm run dev
Figma: figma.com/file/launchpad-onboarding
notes: Do not change analytics event names until the dashboard queries are updated. Mobile spacing is still too tight on 375px widths.

name: Client Proposal Kit
goal: Create a reusable proposal system so new client offers take less than 30 minutes to assemble.
lastState: Template structure exists and pricing blocks are drafted. Testimonials still need to be selected and legal wording needs one final pass.
nextAction: Review the legal section and replace placeholders with the approved wording from the contract notes.
startup:
Docs folder: /Users/you/Documents/ProposalKit
Reference folder: previous-client-wins
Need access: brand assets drive link
notes: Keep two pricing tiers only. The full-service package is the anchor. Reuse the fintech case study if the client is B2B SaaS.

name: Automation Audit
goal: Document repetitive work and identify the top 5 automations worth building this quarter.
lastState: Collected notes from email triage and reporting workflows. Need to finish the scoring model for impact vs setup effort.
nextAction: Score the remaining workflows in the spreadsheet and sort by time saved per week.
startup:
Spreadsheet: ops-automation-audit.xlsx
Calendar notes from Feb 24 and Feb 25
Use the impact/effort rubric from the Notion template
notes: Avoid automating unstable processes. Fix the workflow first, then automate. Email tagging is promising but depends on cleaner labels.
